landing.eyebrow: Put the club at the center of progression
landing.heroTitle: Give your whole structure one shared philosophy.
landing.heroSubtitle: Grinta helps the club formalize its game identity, then translate it into cycles, weekly themes, and concrete sessions. Every team follows the same direction, adapted to its age and level.
landing.principlesTitle: A philosophy that reaches the pitch.

identity.title: A readable identity
identity.body: The club defines its principles: how it wants to develop, play, progress, and evaluate.

continuity.title: Continuity by category
continuity.body: Every team keeps the same backbone, with content adapted to its age and level.

transmission.title: Clear transmission
transmission.body: Coaches share one language, shared objectives, and coherent sessions.

landing.wizardTitle: The wizard turns a session idea into a pitch-ready PDF.
landing.wizardBody: As you scroll, the preparation sheet shows its real flow: guided brief, warm-up, pitch blocks, then PDF export on the Grinta template.

brief.title: Build the guiding thread
brief.body: The coach chooses the game moment, focus, objective, and questions that will guide the players.

warmup.title: Prepare the body and the theme
warmup.body: The session starts with activation, connection to the theme, and a short explosive phase.

blocks.title: Draw the situations and coaching points
blocks.body: The main blocks combine diagram, duration, organization, coaching, and variations.

pdf.title: Export a clean sheet
pdf.body: The preparation becomes a printable A4 sheet, clear for staff and usable on the pitch.

wizardMock.label: Preparation wizard
wizardMock.title: Session sheet

activate.label: Phase 1
activate.title: Activate
activate.hint: Mobility, prevention, ball work, and rhythm.

connect.label: Phase 2
connect.title: Connect
connect.hint: Rondo or possession with a constraint linked to the theme.

main1.title: Main block 1
main1.hint: Game form with the expected behavior made visible.

main2.title: Main block 2
main2.hint: Exercise or variation to stabilize the learning.

game.title: Final game
game.hint: Back to play with observation criteria.

wizardMock.pdfBody: The wizard fields are placed into the PDF sheet with diagrams, coaching points, durations, and reflections.

landing.flowTitle: From club philosophy to today's session.

philosophy.title: Philosophy
philosophy.body: The club sets its strong ideas: game intentions, development values, and progression priorities.

category.title: Categories
category.body: Principles are adapted by age group to build a coherent player pathway.

cycle.title: Cycles
cycle.body: The season is organized into readable blocks, with themes that build progression.

session.title: Session
session.body: Each session becomes a concrete expression of the philosophy, not isolated content.

landing.featuresTitle: A more coherent club, without rigid training.

identity.title: Club frame
identity.body: Formalize shared principles so every staff member knows what should be transmitted.

planner.title: Continuous planning
planner.body: Connect categories, cycles, weeks, and sessions so progression remains visible.

preparation.title: Preparation sheet
preparation.body: Prepare clear, printable sessions aligned with the club's principles.

auth.loginSubtitle: Log in to plan your team's training.
auth.signupSubtitle: Set up your account in 30 seconds.
auth.fullNameHelp: Shown in the app and on your team pages.
auth.emailHelp: We'll use this to log you in.
auth.passwordHelpLogin: The password you chose at signup.
auth.checkEmail: We sent a confirmation link to your email. Click it to activate your account.
auth.emailAlreadyExists: This email already has an account. Log in instead.
auth.emailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email before logging in. Check your inbox.
auth.confirmedBody: Your email address has been confirmed and your account is now active.
auth.confirmedRedirect: Redirecting you to the login page…

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.ctaJoinClubDesc: Paste an invitation link to join an existing club.
dashboard.ctaCreateClubDesc: Plan seasons, manage teams, invite staff. Paid plan.
dashboard.ctaCreateSessionDesc: One training sheet, ready in two minutes.

teams.title: Teams
teams.empty: No teams yet. Create your first one.

players.title: Players
players.empty: No players in this team yet.

exercises.title: Exercise library
exercises.empty: Your library is empty. Add your first exercise.

setup.title: Set up your season
setup.subtitle: Anchor your macrocycle to real dates so weeks number correctly (-3, -2, -1, +1, +2…).
setup.name: Tour name
setup.preseasonStartHint: First Monday of week -N (snapped to Monday).
setup.firstMatchHint: Week containing this date becomes week +1.
setup.totalWeeksPending: Pick dates to see total weeks.

err.invalidDates: End date must be after preseason start.
err.weekMismatch: Mesocycle weeks ({sum}) must equal total weeks ({total}).

tour.confirmDelete: Delete this tour? All its weeks will be removed.
tour.confirmRemoveCycle: Remove this cycle? Its weeks and any sessions attached to them will be detached.

edit.endDateHint: Same total weeks required — to add or remove weeks, use Cycle view (coming soon).
edit.mesoCountHint: Adding or removing mesocycles is coming in Cycle view. For now you can only rename, recolor, and re-type them.

option.recupere_perd: We recover and lose the ball

weeks.emptyMonth: Nothing planned for these weeks yet — add a cycle or set up a season to start filling them in.

session.noExercises: No exercises attached. Add some from your library.
